summary: Resolved review-v1 (2 findings, both APPLY, frontend-only). ISSUE-1 [HIGH]: Today 기록 record targets now include events from event-bearing cards (conflict→pair.a/pair.b, next_event/needs_review/schedule_prompt→event) in addition to surface.dayEvents, deduped by id — so any event-bearing Today card is a selectable record target; derived as a separate value (no card render/priority change). New Today test: dayEvents=[] + a next_event card → its event (id 91) is selectable and submit posts /api/events/91/annotations {text}. /input was already correct (loadData merges dayEvents+unscheduled), so no /input change. ISSUE-2 [LOW]: Watcher result card status now states the created subtype kind via new watcherSubtypeLabel (날짜 기반/역산 계획/수동 확인); ComposerResult watcher variant gains subtype:WatcherSubtype (stored at submit) on both /input and Today; status = `${watcherSubtypeLabel(subtype)} Watcher가 만들어졌어`; endpoints/shapes unchanged; InputHub 3 subtype tests + Today date-threshold assert the subtype label. CreationComposer untouched (still pure). RESOLVED appended below the sentinel. Committed 2f2a1a2.
checks: corepack pnpm test (web 485 incl. InputHub 63 / Today 170 — +1 ISSUE-1 card-target test, +ISSUE-2 subtype-status assertions; shared/server unchanged)
